text.title: Autofix-vs-Flag Decision Rule for Coding Agents Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: evaluate-4-clauses
step.action: Check: syntactic? explicit-fix? tests exist? diff < 50 OR single rule?

step.name: apply-or-flag
step.action: If autofix: apply, run tests; on test failure rollback + flag. Else: emit lint comment.
